raw_consumer_statement: This is for a Citi Custom Cash credit card. I disputed an transaction of {$400.00} on XX/XX/XXXX to a fitness club but release it as a result of communication with club manager. I agreed to release this dispute and Citi should pay this amount to the fitness club. However, the club accountant and manager notified me that they never received this transaction from credit card company. I called several times ( in XXXX, XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX ). At first time, Citi claimed the transaction happened and should arrive within 15 business days after this case is closed. And second time, they claim the case would be closed at end of XX/XX/XXXX, and the payment would go through until mid of XX/XX/XXXX. I checked again with club manager in XX/XX/XXXX and still no payment was posted by Citi, while I already make payment to the credit card statement blance. I asked Citi to send more details to my email address they have on file, and they agreed on the phone and never come back with an response.
